title_cn: 美国炼油商获得再次购买伊朗原油的难得机会
summary: The Trump administration has temporarily eased some sanctions on Iranian oil, pausing hostilities that have defined US-Iran relations since the 1979 hostage crisis.

title_cn: 墨西哥筹集 63 亿美元新债券为回购提供资金
summary: Mexico raised $6.3 billion in bonds to fund a buyback of its existing debt as credit-rating firms warn over the nation’s widening fiscal deficit, raising concerns over its investment-grade status.

title: Schick Razor Maker Is Said to Reject Unsolicited Takeover Offer
title_cn: 据说 Schick Razor Maker 拒绝主动收购要约
summary: Edgewell Personal Care Co., which makes Schick razors, has rejected an unsolicited takeover offer from private equity firm Yellow Wood Partners, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: Cotopaxi CEO: Luggage a ‘Natural Extension’ for Brand
title_cn: Cotopaxi首席执行官：行李箱是品牌的“自然延伸”
summary: Lindsay Shumlas, CEO of Cotopaxi, discusses the company's recent expansion from backpacks into the luggage market with the launch of their new Coraza luggage line. The product, introduced about two months ago, emphasizes sustainability and durability through a repair-led model, contrasting with the typical replacement-focused luggage industry. She speaks with Romaine Bostick & Katie Greifeld on "The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: CME Direct Trading Platform Is Back Up After Earlier Disruptions
title_cn: CME 直接交易平台在早期中断后已恢复
summary: Trading on CME Group Inc.’s CME Direct platform is back up after a brief disruption Monday as it experienced technical difficulties, according to traders.

title: Espriella’s Narrow Win Caps Post Election Gains in Colombia
title_cn: 埃斯普里埃拉在哥伦比亚大选后的胜利有限
summary: The rally sparked by Abelardo de la Espriella’s win in Colombian elections faded just hours into the session as investors worried that one of the tightest presidential elections in the nation’s history will limit his mandate to implement market-friendly policies.

title: Qualcomm Nears Deal for AI Chip Startup Modular
title_cn: 高通接近与 AI 芯片初创公司 Modular 达成交易
summary: Qualcomm Inc. is in advanced talks to acquire Modular Inc. in a transaction valuing the artificial intelligence chip startup at about $4 billion, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: Hedge Funds Piled Into Bearish Oil Bets Ahead of US-Iran MOU
title_cn: 在美伊谅解备忘录签署之前，对冲基金纷纷押注看跌石油
summary: Hedge funds boosted bearish bets on US crude to the most in nearly five months on expectations that a preliminary peace deal between Washington and Tehran will boost Middle East oil flows through the Strait of Hormuz.

title: 【今朝の5本】仕事を始める前に読んでおきたい厳選ニュース

title: Mr. Fed Pres.: Warsh Every Bit as Nuanced as Greenspan
title_cn: 美联储主席先生：沃什与格林斯潘一样细致入微
summary: Thomas Hoenig, Former Kansas City Fed President discusses the leadership style of former Fed Chair Alan Greenspan during FOMC meetings, providing historical context and perspective on Greenspan's approach to monetary policy decision-making. He speaks with Romaine Bostick & Katie Greifeld on "The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Fmr. Fed Governor Meyer on Working With Greenspan, Warsh
title_cn: 先生。美联储理事迈耶谈与格林斯潘、沃什的合作
summary: Larry Meyer, former Federal Reserve Governor and current Chairman at Monetary Policy Analytics, to discuss the legacy of Alan Greenspan following his death at age 100. Meyer, who served on the Fed's board from 1996 to 2002, is asked to share his perspective on Greenspan's impact during his 18-year tenure as Fed chairman. He speaks with Romaine Bostick & Katie Greifeld on "The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Carlyle Rethinks Portfolio Risk to Give Weather Insurance a Bigger Role
title_cn: 凯雷重新思考投资组合风险，赋予天气保险更大作用
summary: Carlyle Group Inc. is unveiling a new framework for portfolio risk so that asset values reflect the insurance implications associated with severe weather shocks.

title: SpaceX Kicks Off Debut US Dollar High-Grade Bond Sale
title_cn: SpaceX 启动首次美元高级债券发售
summary:
Bloomberg Intelligence senior technology credit analyst Robert Schiffman said that SpaceX is set up for a large bond sale because rating agencies believe the tech giant will grow into the positive ratings despite numbers not adding up right now. Schiffman said that investors in SpaceX are looking at Musk as a visionary to show them the future of AI. 
 (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Emerging-Market Stocks Mark Fresh High as US-Iran Talks Progress, Oil Falls
title_cn: 随着美伊谈判取得进展、油价下跌，新兴市场股市创下新高
summary: Most emerging-market currencies slid Monday on the back of a stronger dollar as rising bets the Federal Reserve will hike rates this year sapped risk appetite, overshadowing the latest developments in the Middle East as the US and Iran make progress toward a peace deal.

title: ETF IQ 6/22/2026
title_cn: ETF IQ 2026 年 6 月 22 日
summary: "Bloomberg ETF IQ" focuses on the opportunities, risks and current trends tied to the trillions of dollars in the global exchange traded funds industry. Today's guests: BlackRock Head of Markets for Model Portfolio Solutions Tushar Yadava, Victory Capital President of Investment & ETFs Mannik Dhillon, and Raymond James Vice President of ETF Strategy Mayuranki De. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Terrell Owens, Syntilay Launch Pickleball Recovery Shoe
title_cn: Terrell Owens 与 Syntilay 推出 Pickleball 恢复鞋
summary: NFL Hall of Famer Terrell Owens & Syntilay CEO Ben Weiss sit down to discuss their collaboration on the TO Reset recovery shoe for pickleball on June 22, 2026. They discussed the 3D-printing technology used to personalize each shoe they make, and how important foot support is for athletes. They speak with Romaine Bostick on “The Close.” (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Psychedelic Drugmaker Definium Surges on Depression Drug Success
title_cn: 迷幻药物制造商地芬尼因抑郁症药物的成功而飙升
summary: Definium Therapeutics Inc. shares soared 50% Monday after late-stage trial data showed “groundbreaking” results in the psychedelic drug developer’s experimental treatment for major depressive disorders.

title: Greenspan 'Pioneered' Fed Communications, Says Betsy Duke
title_cn: 贝齐·杜克 (Betsy Duke) 表示，格林斯潘“开创了”美联储沟通的先河
summary: Former Fed Governor Betsy Duke remembers Fed Chair Alan Greenspan and said that the former chief 'pioneered Fed communications' and marked a shift in how the central bank relayed information from the committee and in the Fed meetings.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Iran Oil Waiver Offers Lifeline to Tehran as Talks Proceed
title_cn: 随着谈判的进行，伊朗石油豁免为德黑兰提供了生命线
summary: The US issued a 60-day license allowing Iran to sell oil on the international market, giving Tehran an economic lifeline as the two adversaries continued talks for a permanent peace deal.

title: Michael Saylor’s Strategy Buys $34.9 Million of Bitcoin Using Common Stock

summary: Michael Saylor’s Strategy Inc. bought $39.4 million of Bitcoin, leaning again on its common stock to fund purchases of the cryptocurrency for a third consecutive week despite earlier pledges to pivot to perpetual preferred shares.

title: Mixed Day on Wall Street as Netflix Continues Fall | Closing Bell

summary: Comprehensive cross-platform coverage of the U.S. market close on Bloomberg Television, Bloomberg Radio, and YouTube with Romaine Bostick, Katie Greifeld, Carol Massar and Tim Stenovec. (Source: Bloomberg)

title_cn: SpaceX 连续第三天下跌，市值蒸发 6000 亿美元
summary: SpaceX shares slipped for a third straight day, shedding hundreds of billions of dollars in market value, after the Elon Musk-led company said it is selling investment-grade bonds for the first time, part of what’s expected to be a massive borrowing spree to fund its artificial-intelligence ambitions.

title: Sony Plans Its First Dollar-Bond Sale in Nearly Three Decades
title_cn: 索尼计划近三年来首次发行美元债券
summary: Sony Group Corp. was still marketing the original PlayStation when it last tapped the US investment-grade bond market. Almost three decades later, it’s readying a comeback.

title: Lending Activity Picks Up as Borrowers Adapt to Higher Rates Says VantageScore
title_cn: VantageScore 表示，随着借款人适应更高的利率，贷款活动有所增加
summary: Silvio Tavares President & CEO at VantageScore joined to discuss the borrowing landscape, and the state of the consumer and their credit health.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Gold Advances After Negotiators Flag Headway in US-Iran Talks
title_cn: 谈判代表表示美伊谈判取得进展，金价上涨
summary: Gold rose as US and Iran negotiations made headway after a rocky start, with the two sides attempting to reach a peace deal within two months and formally end a war that has roiled global markets.

title: Venezuelan Bonds Tumble as Investors Brace for Debt Assessment
title_cn: 投资者准备进行债务评估，委内瑞拉债券暴跌
summary: Venezuelan bonds tumbled to the lowest level in two months as investors braced for a highly anticipated review of the nation’s debt burden and economic prospects.

title: Alphabet Shares Drop After Second AI Star Departs for Rival
title_cn: 第二位人工智能明星离开竞争对手后 Alphabet 股价下跌
summary: Alphabet Inc. shares tumbled on Monday following the departure of another high-profile artificial intelligence leader to a rival.

title: Media Consolidation in Its ‘Middle Innings’: Tom Ara
title_cn: 媒体整合的“中局”：汤姆·阿拉
summary: Tom Ara, Weil, Gotshal & Manges Entertainment, Sport & Media Head, discusses significant mergers and acquisitions in Hollywood during the first half of 2026. Highlighted deals include Fox's $22 billion investment in Roku and Paramount's $110 billion acquisition of Warner Brothers Discovery. Ara explains that the market has shifted from a cautious stance last year to a more confident environment, leading to increased capital deployment and ongoing consolidation in the entertainment sector. He speaks with Romaine Bostick & Katie Greifeld on "The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Getty Images Surges 145% After Announcing OpenAI Deal
title_cn: 宣布与 OpenAI 达成交易后，Getty Images 股价飙升 145%
summary: Shares of stock-photo company Getty Images Holdings Inc. soared as much as 145% on Monday after it announced a licensing deal with OpenAI.

title: Microsoft and Chevron Sign 20-Year Power Deal For Texas Data Center
title_cn: 微软和雪佛龙签署德克萨斯数据中心 20 年电力协议
summary: Chevron Corp. signed a 20-year deal with Microsoft Corp. to provide natural-gas fired power for a proposed West Texas data center, which could be one of the biggest in the US.

title: Columbia Threadneedle's Wade Sees AI Buoying Tech Rally
title_cn: Columbia Threadneedle 的 Wade 看到人工智能推动技术反弹
summary: The boom in artificial-intelligence spending is actually accelerating, setting up the rally in tech stocks to continue for at least another couple of quarters, according to Tiffany Wade, a senior portfolio manager at Columbia Threadneedle Investments. She speaks with Ed Ludlow on Bloomberg Television's "Bloomberg Tech." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: SpaceX Readies Its $20 Billion Bond Debut to Fund AI Ambition
title_cn: SpaceX 准备发行 200 亿美元债券，为人工智能雄心提供资金
summary: SpaceX is selling investment-grade bonds for the first time in what’s expected to be the start of a massive borrowing spree to fund the company’s AI ambitions following its record $75 billion IPO.

title: SpaceX Kicks Off High-Grade Bond Sale | Bloomberg Tech 6/22/2026
title_cn: SpaceX 启动高等级债券发售彭博科技 2026 年 6 月 22 日
summary: Bloomberg’s Ed Ludlow breaks down SpaceX's first-ever investment-grade bond offering following its record-breaking IPO. Plus, Micron strikes an AI Infrastructure agreement with Anthropic to drive enterprise AI adoption. And Chevron signs a 20-year deal with Microsoft to power a West Texas data center that could be one of the biggest in the US. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: AI-Services Startup Baseten Nabs $13 Billion Valuation
title_cn: 人工智能服务初创公司 Baseten 估值达 130 亿美元
summary: Baseten, which provides software and computing capacity to companies tapping into lower-cost AI models, just closed a $1.5 billion Series F round at a $13 billion valuation. Baseten CEO Tuhin Srivastava and Apoorv Agrawal, partner at Altimeter, which co-lead this round, sit down with Ed Ludlow on "Bloomberg Tech." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Valve Prices Steam Machine Video Game Console Above $1,000, Citing Component Shortage
title_cn: Valve 以组件短缺为由，将 Steam 视频游戏机价格提高到 1,000 美元以上
summary: Valve Corp. announced pricing and availability details for the Steam Machine, a cube-shaped video game console that has seen its release pushed back several months due to pricing volatility around memory, solid-state drives and other components.

title: Apple’s New CEO Must Restore Company’s Design Edge: Power On
title_cn: 苹果新任首席执行官必须恢复公司的设计优势：启动
summary: The top priority for new Apple CEO John Ternus should be revamping the company’s design team and putting the focus back on the look and feel of products, writes Bloomberg's Mark Gurman in his latest Power On newsletter. He joins Ed Ludlow for more on "Bloomberg Tech." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Microsoft, Chevron Sign Power Deal for Texas Data Center
title_cn: 微软与雪佛龙签署德克萨斯州数据中心电力协议
summary:
Chevron Corp. signed a 20-year deal with Microsoft Corp. to provide natural-gas fired power for a proposed West Texas data center, which could be one of the biggest in the US.

The proposed plant, Project Kilby, is expected to start producing power by 2028 and will ramp up to 2.67 gigawatts over time, Houston-based Chevron said in a statement Monday. That’s enough to power more than 530,000 Texas homes. The oil giant, which is collaborating on the development with investment fund Engine No. 1, plans to make a final investment decision later this year. Bloomberg News previously reported the companies were in exclusive talks over a long-term power deal.

For more, we speak with Kevin Crowley, Bloomberg News Oil Reporter. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Kids’ Online Safety Bill Deal Struck by House GOP, Democrats
title_cn: 众议院共和党和民主党达成儿童在线安全法案协议
summary: House lawmakers have reached a bipartisan deal on a legislative package intended to strengthen online safety and privacy protections for children and teenagers—a key sign of progress on a major policy priority.

title: Tech Rally Is Seen Having More Runway as AI Spending Gains Speed
title_cn: 随着人工智能支出的加速，科技股的上涨将有更多的空间
summary: Technology stocks will extend their rally for at least another couple of quarters as artificial intelligence infrastructure spending accelerates beyond the pace of the past two years, Columbia Threadneedle Investments’ Tiffany Wade said.

title: Gas Stations Accused of Using AI to Inflate Prices in California
title_cn: 加州加油站被指控使用人工智能抬高价格
summary: A group of California consumers claimed in a lawsuit that gas station owners including Walmart Inc., Marathon Petroleum Corp., BP Plc and 7-Eleven Inc. are using artificial intelligence to illegally manipulate pump prices in the state that already has the highest rates in the US.

title: Centrica CEO Eyes US for More LNG Deals and Trading Expansion
title_cn: Centrica 首席执行官将目光投向美国，寻求更多液化天然气交易和贸易扩张
summary: The UK’s Centrica Plc plans to buy more US liquefied natural gas, as it sees the fuel remaining a key part of the energy system for decades even as global geopolitical tensions highlight the need to diversify supplies.

title: How Eli Lilly Became a $1 Trillion Company
title_cn: 礼来公司 (Eli Lilly) 如何成为价值 1 万亿美元的公司
summary: Mounjaro and Zepbound turned Eli Lilly into a trillion-dollar pharmaceutical giant. But every blockbuster drug eventually faces competition. Here’s what Lilly is doing to stay on top. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: JPMorgan's Sundar Discusses AI Investment Opportunities
title_cn: 摩根大通的桑达尔讨论人工智能投资机会
summary: Sitara Sundar, JPMorgan Private Bank Head of Alternative Investment Strategy, provided insights on the recent explosive growth in memory chip stocks, highlighting companies like Micron which have seen gains of up to 1,000% over the past year. She discussed the current bottlenecks in chip supply and explored potential next steps for investors seeking opportunities in the AI sector beyond the chip market. The segment also noted the broader market context with fluctuating stock prices influenced by geopolitical developments between the US and Iran. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Groq Raises $650 Million to Aid in Pivot After Nvidia Deal
title_cn: 与 Nvidia 达成交易后，Groq 筹集 6.5 亿美元以协助 Pivot
summary: Groq Inc. raised $650 million in a new funding round aimed at expanding its data center capacity and helping the one-time chip startup become a provider of artificial intelligence computing.

title: How AI Is Reshaping Retail Discounts
title_cn: 人工智能如何重塑零售折扣
summary: Upside Co-Founder and CEO Alex Kinnier joins Bloomberg Open Interest to explain why American consumers are feeling squeezed despite falling gas prices, reveals what transaction data says about spending habits. He also discusses how AI is transforming retail with hyper-personalized offers that save consumers money while helping retailers grow profits. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Kazakh $1 Billion Fund Backs Startups as Region Lures Investment
title_cn: 哈萨克斯坦地区吸引投资，10亿美元基金支持初创企业
summary: Kazakhstan’s Alem Capital Management anchored a regional venture capital fund backing technology startups across Central Asia and the Caucasus.

title: SpaceX Inks Multibillion-Dollar Computing Deal With Reflection AI
title_cn: SpaceX 与 Reflection AI 签署价值数十亿美元的计算协议
summary: SpaceX has inked a multibillion-dollar agreement to provide computing resources to artificial intelligence startup Reflection AI, the latest in a string deals from Elon Musk’s firm as it vies to become an AI infrastructure provider.

title: How Anthropic Weighs the Risk of Human Extinction
title_cn: 人类如何权衡人类灭绝的风险
summary:
There’s a lot to unpack with AI right now, including its potential impacts on the labor market and society and more extreme questions about existential risk.

On this episode of the Odd Lots podcast, Anthropic’s Jack Clark (co-founder and head of public benefit) and Peter McCrory (head of economics) join Joe Weisenthal and Tracy Alloway to discuss how the company views the possibility of AI killing all humans and its approach to safety and economic risks. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Two Plead Guilty to Hacking Transport for London While Teenagers
title_cn: 两名青少年承认对伦敦交通进行黑客攻击
summary: Two British men pleaded guilty to carrying out a cyber attack on London’s transport network while still teenagers.

title: Using AI to Develop New Drugs
title_cn: 利用人工智能开发新药
summary: Shawn Rosemarin, Global VP of Research & Development, Customer Engineering, Everpure and Pradeep Bandaru, Head of Platforms & AI Workflows at Sanofi join Carol Massar and Tim Stenovec to discuss the way better data can help the pharmaceutical industry develop new drugs.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: SpaceX Kicks Off Debut High-Grade Bond Sale
title_cn: SpaceX 启动首次高等级债券发售
summary: SpaceX is selling investment-grade bonds for the first time to fund the company's AI ambitions following its record IPO. Ed Ludlow has more on "Bloomberg Open Interest." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Nvidia Seeks to Make Humanoid AI Robots Safer Around Humans
title_cn: Nvidia 寻求让人形人工智能机器人在人类周围更安全
summary: Nvidia Corp. is working to make humanoid robots safer around people, arguing that they’ll need to handle split-second decisions before they can be trusted to work closely with humans.

title: Meta Taps New WhatsApp Boss as Part of $900 Million Investment
title_cn: Meta 任命 WhatsApp 新任老板作为 9 亿美元投资的一部分
summary: Meta Platforms Inc. is investing $900 million into Indian fintech startup Cred, with plans to appoint its founder, Kunal Shah, the new leader of WhatsApp.

title: Who Is Andy Burnham, the UK’s Likely Next Prime Minister?
title_cn: 英国可能的下一任首相安迪·伯纳姆是谁？
summary: Andy Burnham’s likely ascent to the pinnacle of UK politics reflects an aptitude as a politician, orator and organizer that many members of Parliament found lacking in the job’s current occupant, Keir Starmer. Burnham, 56, a Labour politician and former mayor of Greater Manchester, appears set to succeed Starmer as prime minister after the incumbent announced his resignation on June 22.

title: Maine Democrats Test Abortion as a Midterm Message
title_cn: 缅因州民主党人测试堕胎作为中期信息
summary: The party is using a vote from 2018 to tap voters’ anger now.

title: A Decade After Brexit, Britain Can’t Keep A Prime Minister
title_cn: 英国脱欧十年后，英国无法留任首相
summary: British Prime Minister Keir Starmer resigned today after less than two years in office. On today’s Big Take podcast, Bloomberg’s Edward Evans and guest host Wendy Benjaminson break down how Starmer became the sixth leader to quit in a decade, and what the turmoil a Downing Street means for the UK’s fractured political system and its relationships globally. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Romania’s Turmoil Deepens After PM Hopeful Loses Vote
title_cn: 总理霍普霍普落选后罗马尼亚动荡加剧
summary: Romania’s prime minister nominee failed to win parliamentary approval for his proposed cabinet, prolonging a political deadlock that risks stalling key reforms for crucial European Union recovery funding.

title: If Iran Doesn't Behave, I Will Do What I Need To Do Says Trump (Q&A)
title_cn: 特朗普表示，如果伊朗不采取行动，我将做我需要做的事（问答）
summary: President Trump spoke to reporters in the Oval Office. He said the US is doing “very well” with respect to Iran negotiations, saying that the Strait of Hormuz is open and Iran will never have a nuclear weapon.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Children’s Online Safety Bill Gains Traction in Congress
title_cn: 儿童在线安全法案在国会获得关注
summary: Momentum is growing in both the US House and Senate on dueling efforts to pass children’s online safety legislation this summer, raising prospects for a breakthrough after big tech lobbying and partisan squabbles stalled the legislation for years.

title: Trump Blames Vandalism for Reflecting Pool Problems
title_cn: 特朗普将泳池问题归咎于故意破坏行为
summary: President Donald Trump says vandals caused the algae blooms and peeling paint at the Lincoln Memorial reflecting pool. He speaks with reporters in the Oval Office. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Trump on Depression Fears: 'I Don't Want to Be Herbert Hoover'
title_cn: 特朗普谈抑郁症恐惧：“我不想成为赫伯特·胡佛”
summary: President Donald Trump addresses concerns about the economic impact from Iran potentially not abiding by the terms of the memorandum of understanding with the US. He speaks with reporters in the Oval Office. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: White House Set to Host Weapons Makers Amid Stockpile Worry
title_cn: 白宫将在库存担忧中接待武器制造商
summary: The White House is set to host a meeting of defense contractors this week to push for more robust munitions production, with stockpiles under strain after nearly four months of war with Iran.

title: Trump Orders US to Speed Quantum Adoption, Boost Cyber Defenses
title_cn: 特朗普命令美国加快量子技术的采用，加强网络防御
summary: President Donald Trump signed executive orders Monday aimed at accelerating quantum research, laying the groundwork for federal agencies to adopt the technology and strengthen US defenses against cyberattacks.

title: Walz Beats Trump Administration Subpoenas in Immigration Row
title_cn: 沃尔兹在移民纠纷中击败了特朗普政府的传票
summary: Minnesota Governor Tim Walz scored a win over the Trump administration after a judge struck down “blatantly unlawful” subpoenas to state officials as part of a probe of their alleged failure to cooperate in the US government’s immigration crackdown.

title: Vance Hails ‘Good Day’ of Iran Talks | Balance of Power 6/22/2026
title_cn: 万斯欢呼伊朗会谈“美好的一天”权力平衡 2026 年 6 月 22 日
summary: On the early edition of Balance of Power, Bloomberg Washington Correspondents Joe Mathieu and Kailey Leinz discuss the latest from the Middle East. On today's show, American Enterprise Institute Nonresident Senior Fellow Heather Conley, FIL Inc. CEO Frank Luntz and National Electrical Manufacturers Association CEO Debra Phillips. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Trump Audit Immunity Deal ‘Illegal,’ Ex-IRS Official Tells Judge
title_cn: 前国税局官员告诉法官，特朗普的审计豁免协议“非法”
summary: The US Justice Department made an illegal deal with President Donald Trump to immunize him, his family and his businesses from audits or other federal probes related to past filings, a group of tax experts and former Internal Revenue Service officials told a judge.

title: Bolivia Plans Push Into Morales Stronghold as Blockades Recede
title_cn: 随着封锁的解除，玻利维亚计划挺进莫拉莱斯要塞
summary: Bolivia’s security forces are preparing to enter the Chapare region, where former President Evo Morales has remained since October 2024, protected by thousands of supporters while evading arrest and encouraging more than 50 days of road blockades that disrupted the economy.

title: Trump, Senate GOP at Odds as Midterm Elections Near
title_cn: 中期选举临近，特朗普与参议院共和党意见不合
summary: Frank Luntz, Pollster and CEO of FIL Inc. joined Balance of Power to discuss the outlook for the Midterm elections post the US Iran War and Trump should expect from his upcoming meeting with Congressional Leaders. After weeks of frustration, the president was invited to come to the Senate GOP’s Wednesday lunch meeting. The invitation came not from Thune, but Rick Scott, the more MAGA-aligned senator who had run against Thune for majority leader.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Trump Administration to Slash Oil-Drilling Bond Amount by 95%
title_cn: 特朗普政府将石油钻探债券金额削减 95%
summary: The US Department of Interior is slashing the bonds oil and natural gas companies must provide when drilling on federal land by 95% in a move to encourage more energy exploration.

title: California Plans $11 Billion Housing Bond for November Election
title_cn: 加州计划为 11 月选举发行 110 亿美元住房债券
summary: California lawmakers said they have agreed to place an $11.3 billion housing bond on the ballot this November, aiming to expand affordable housing and homeownership.

title: Burnham Poised for Power in UK After Starmer Steps Aside
title_cn: 斯塔默退位后，伯纳姆准备在英国掌权
summary: Andy Burnham appears set to become the UK’s seventh prime minister in a decade after Keir Starmer laid out a timeline for his own departure and potential rivals backed a quick transition to the popular Manchester politician.

title: Russia Says Ukrainian Attack on Industrial Plant Kills Five
title_cn: 俄罗斯称乌克兰对工业工厂的袭击造成五人死亡
summary: Local authorities in Russia said at least five people had been killed in a missile attack on an industrial plant in the Voronezh region.

title: US Waives Iran Oil Sanctions as Peace Deal Brings Huge Shift
title_cn: 和平协议带来巨大转变，美国放弃对伊朗石油制裁
summary: The US has authorized the sale of Iranian oil and fuels as part of an agreement to end the war against Tehran, a sweeping change after years of economic sanctions.

title: Lagarde Says China Should Be Part of Any Talks on FX Imbalances
title_cn: 拉加德表示中国应该参与有关外汇失衡的任何谈判
summary: Any Group of Seven talks on currency valuations need to include China, according to European Central Bank President Christine Lagarde.

title: How Will Wall Street Remember Alan Greenspan?
title_cn: 华尔街将如何记住艾伦·格林斯潘？
summary: Alan Greenspan has died at the age of 100. Greenspan’s 18 years as Fed chief, from 1987 until his retirement at the start of 2006, were marked by a stock market boom and low unemployment. Bloomberg's Michael McKee reports on how Wall Street may see Greenspan's legacy.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Trump Ally Wins Colombia Election, Heralding Pro-Market Turn
title_cn: 特朗普盟友赢得哥伦比亚大选，预示着亲市场的转变
summary: Colombia had its presidential election over the weekend and while the confirmed results are still to come, preliminary results show conservative lawyer Abelardo de la Espriella was in the lead, heralding a swing back to business-friendly and pro-US policies after four years of leftist rule. Malu Poveda explains  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: US Had 'Very Good Day' Speaking With Iran, Vance Says
title_cn: 万斯表示，美国与伊朗的对话“非常愉快”
summary: US Vice President JD Vance said talks with Iran over the weekend were “very, very good,” as the sides attempt to reach a peace deal within two months and formally end a war. Vance says a key point was building a mechanism to keep the Strait of Hormuz open. He spoke to reporters in Emmen, Switzerland where talks are being held. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Romanian Premier Nominee Courts Far Right in Confidence Vote Bid
title_cn: 罗马尼亚总理候选人向极右翼寻求信任投票
summary: Romania’s prime minister-designate turned to far-right lawmakers for support as he tries to build a majority ahead of a confidence vote in a deeply divided parliament.

title: Why the Israel-Hezbollah Fight Complicates Resolving the Iran War
title_cn: 为什么以色列与真主党的斗争使伊朗战争的解决变得复杂
summary: After the US and Israel began their war with Iran on Feb. 28, the Iran-backed Lebanese militia Hezbollah was quick to join the fray, firing rockets and drones into Israel. Officials there saw in the crisis sweeping the region a chance to finally drive Hezbollah, already weakened by a series of setbacks, away from Israel’s northern border.

title: The People Around Andy Burnham Who Could Shape UK Politics
title_cn: 安迪·伯纳姆周围能够塑造英国政治的人
summary: Andy Burnham looks likely to become the UK’s next prime minister after Keir Starmer announced his resignation and potential rivals endorsed Parliament’s newest MP to succeed him.
